mapper.select:
/* findActiveEmployeeRates */
SELECT ID, INSURANCE_TYPE, RATE_TARGET, RATE, BASE_TYPE, EFFECTIVE_FROM, EFFECTIVE_TO, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM INSURANCE_RATE_RULES WHERE RATE_TARGET = 'EMPLOYEE' AND IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND EFFECTIVE_FROM <= #{baseDate} AND (EFFECTIVE_TO IS NULL OR EFFECTIVE_TO >= #{baseDate}) ORDER BY INSURANCE_TYPE, EFFECTIVE_FROM DESC

/* findAll */ SELECT ID, INSURANCE_TYPE, RATE_TARGET, RATE, BASE_TYPE, EFFECTIVE_FROM, EFFECTIVE_TO, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM INSURANCE_RATE_RULES ORDER BY INSURANCE_TYPE, RATE_TARGET, EFFECTIVE_FROM DESC
